title: Graphorkis madagascariensis
taxonomy: Graphorkis madagascariensis is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. It belongs to the genus Graphorkis, which is a part of the subtribe Thrixiontinae within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The genus Graphorkis is characterized by its small to medium-sized flowers with three sepals and three petals. The classification of Graphorkis madagascariensis is further supported by its unique combination of morphological characteristics, such as its short inflorescence and small, greenish-yellow flowers. This classification has been confirmed through various taxonomic studies and is widely accepted by botanists.
